node.text: The Café for All Supporters. 🌍 @Max.Fosh goes door-to-door to turn a small Italian café into the Fan Eatery of the Olympic Winter Games. #Olympics #MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Fast action at breath-taking pace. Between skaters who are like warriors. 🏒 There's nothing like ice hockey!

Let's go through the rules of Olympic ice hockey and the format of the competition. 

#MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #Allianz

Who’s enjoying the @milanocortina2026 Bobsleigh?

As the Official Insurer, we’re proud to partner with Milano Cortina 2026 ensuring safe Olympic Games to give athletes the confidence to step into their best run yet.

#MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Steer too hard, and you can lose speed. Not enough, and you can lose control. That’s the balancing act of bobsleigh! 👀 

Find out how the world’s best bobsledders fight for every hundredth of a second. 

#MilanoCortina2026 #Bobsleigh #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Next-level safety 🛷✨ 

All season long, the Allianz Safety Sled has been enhancing safety for Bobsleigh athletes, helping them prepare for every turn. 

We can’t wait to see them in action at @milanocortina2026 🎊 

#Olympics #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Introducing the Allianz Head Impact Protection System 💡 

With Bobsleigh athletes whizzing down the track at 160km per hour just inches above the ice, discover how the HIP system safeguards athletes’ heads in case of a rollover. 

#StepIntoLife #Allianz

✨Lighting the way for athletes to step into their greatest moments. 

In sports. And life. 

#MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
From breathtaking jumps to mesmerizing spins, figure skating is a sport for athletes and artists. 🤩
 
⛸️ Find out how this magnificent sport works, and what the stars of the ice must do to achieve the highest score.
 
#milanocortina2026 #figureskating #stepintolife #allianz

node.text:
Tonight feels special. ✨

After all the waiting and preparation, the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 have officially started.

As athletes from all over the world are stepping into their moment, we are looking forward to cheering 📣 them on in peaceful competition. 

And we are grateful for all the teams, coaches and volunteers behind them who make this moment a reality.

Allianz is proud to be the Official Insurer.

#MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #Allianz

❄️ 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲 𝗪𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗢𝗹𝘆𝗺𝗽𝗶𝗰𝘀 🥇🥈🥉 The Allianz Arena shines in the colors of the German and Italian flags at the start of the Olympic Games in Milano Cortina. 🇩🇪🏟️🇮🇹
 
This is a symbol of solidarity and stands for the unique power of sport to bring people from all nations together. We keep our fingers crossed for all athletes and wish them a peaceful and successful Olympic and Paralympic Games.

node.text:
Step into Games-time 😎

As the Official Insurer, we’re here for the ups 🏔️, downs ⛷️and everything in between at the Olympic Winter Games. 🏒✨

So join us in cheering on the athletes, volunteers and everyone who has worked so hard to light up Milano Cortina 2026. 

Team Allianz is ready – are you?

@olympics

#MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
It’s almost time… ⏳

With one month to go until the Paralympic Winter Games, we’re super excited to support the athletes as they step into Games-mode ahead of Milano Cortina 2026. 

👉 As the Official Insurer, follow @allianz for the very latest from the Games.

@paralympics @milanocortina2026 

#MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #allianz

I am glad to join the great @allianz family. 
A partnership built on shared values such as resilience, trust, and a desire to excel.

#MoneyMindfulness #Allianz

node.text:
Could a normal guy replace a member of the Austrian national bob team? Maybe... but not without getting stuck a few times first! 😅

🛷 Join Max Fosh on this challenge, as he trains with professional bobsledders and learns just how important teamwork and synchronisation are in this winter sport.

#Olympics #MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #Allianz

Welcome to the think-first buy-later era. 
What impulse buys are you retiring this year? 💸

#MoneyMindfulness #Allianz

#1 again!🥇 Allianz has achieved its strongest year-on-year growth in the 2026 @brand.finance Global 500 report. 
 
⬆️ #1 Brand in Insurance and Asset Management  
⬆️ 22% up in Brand value  
⬆️ Global rank #21 (up 4 positions)  
 
Thank you to our customers and partners worldwide for your trust, and to our employees, agents, and brokers for your dedication and care.  
 
#BFGlobal500 #Allianz

node.text:
As the Official Insurer, we can’t wait to cheer on the athletes as they step into the biggest moments of their careers at the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026. ✨ 

👉 Follow @allianz for the very latest from the Games. 

@olympics @milanocortina2026 

#olympics #milanocortina2026 #stepintolife #allianz

node.text:
One year of making Bobsleigh even safer!

Before each race the Allianz Safety Sled tests the track. Giving athletes and pilots more insights in real-time. By developing safety standards every athlete can step into their best run yet. Knowing they’re supported at every turn.

#AllianzSafetySled #allianz

Milano Cortina is ready 🏔️. The athletes are ready 🎿. 

Time to get ready for the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games and step into 2026. Together. 

#milanocortina2026 #stepintolife #allianz

node.text:
Real trust begins where sight ends.
@max.fosh learns to trust, listen, and follow a Paralympic guide down the slopes as he skis a mountain blind.

node.text:
@Max.Fosh tries something he’s never done before: skiing without sight. ⛷️
 
Guided by a Paralympic athlete, can he trust enough to make it down the mountain?
 
Watch the full experience — link in bio.
 
#Paralympics #MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
A really special day being able to meet and surprise eight @fcbayern fans 🙌

Together with @allianz we celebrated football’s power to connect with people beyond the pitch – feeling at home through sport and community. 

Check out the full video and the behind the scenes via the link in the @allianz bio! 👌

#AllTogether #Allianz

node.text:
More than just a game 🙌❤️

Amazing to meet Graham and share stories together. Special feeling being able to surprise fans and build connections.

Thanks @allianz for setting this up… more to come soon 👀

#AllTogether #Allianz

node.text:
How adaptable are you… on ice? 🧊
 
Olympic curlers challenge @max.fosh and they push his focus, balance, and quick thinking to the limit.
 
Watch how he handles the pressure — link in bio.
                  
#Olympics #MilanoCortina2026 #Curling #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Win a pair of tickets to Milano Cortina 2026! ⛷️

As the Official Insurer, we’re giving 5 lucky fans the chance to win a pair of tickets to the Olympic & Paralympic Winter Games. 🏂

So bring a friend and get ready to step into the world of winter sports like never before. 😎

Here’s how to enter: 
1. Give us a follow
2. Like this post
3. Comment with a ticket emoji 🎟️

Hurry, entries close December 17 at 23:59 CET. T&Cs in bio. 

#MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Could a normal guy win a match against a professional curling team? Probably not... But, what about when changing up the equipment? 🤔

🥌 Join Max Fosh on this challenge, as he learns from some of the best curlers in Germany and Austria and from other experts about the adaptability required to perform at the top level.

#Olympics #MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #Allianz @Allianz

Elephants never forget. But how many close friends can you name? 🐘🐘🐘

#StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Win a new yoga mat!

We know that in sports and life, it pays to be ready.
Take the 🦛 Happy Hippo Test 🦛 and find out just how ready you are.

See how Olympic sailing champion Odile van Aanholt takes on the challenge, and then take yours ⛵!

How to enter:

1. Like this post
2. Comment with a hippo 🦛

3 prizes, 3 winners. Be quick, entries close November 21st at 23:59 CET. T&Cs in bio.

@ootje5 

#StepIntoLife #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics #Allianz

Smiles are medicine. Hippo laughs are super-medicine. 

#StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Resilient communities start with bold ideas. 🌍 

We are launching the #MoveNow Global Social Innovation Challenge with @SocialShifters—backing youth-led innovation to today's biggest challenges. 

Are you 18–30 with a solution that matters? Apply now in one of three areas: 

🧠 Financial Inclusion & Empowerment 
💪 Health & Well-Being 
🌍 Climate Resilience 

What you get:  

💰 Financial support 
🤝 Expert mentoring 

Ready to make your move? 
Link in bio to apply ⬆️  

#PowerOfUnity #Allianz

node.text:
Imagine being on a seven-week-long holiday celebrating your 50th wedding anniversary, only to end up in a hospital bed instead.

This is what happened to Bernie and Tricia from New Zealand in our latest episode of “Humans at Allianz”. Luckily, the team from @allianzpartners got involved.

Watch the full story via the link in our bio.

#HumansOfAllianz #Allianz

node.text:
Win one of five meditation cushions! 
 
We know that in sports and life, it pays to be ready. And with simple life checks like the 🐧 Candle Test 🐧 you can see just how ready you are. 
 
See how figure skater Adam Hagara gets on ⛸️ – and then try to win one of five meditation cushions! 
To enter:
1. Like this post 
2. Comment with a penguin 🐧
 
5 prizes, 5 winners. Get your skates on, entries close November 9 at 23:59 CET. T&Cs in bio.
@adam.hagara.2006 
 
#StepIntoLife #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics #Allianz

Strong lungs, strong life 💪. Test your puffing power 🐧.

#StepIntoLife #Allianz

You’re excited. We’re excited. ❄️✨

Step into the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 together with us.

For Sports. And Life. ⛸️ 🌍

node.text:
The athletes. Fans. All of us 💪

Get ready to step into the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026. Together. 🙌

#StepIntoLife #MilanoCortina2026 #Allianz

How safe is autonomous driving, and what does it mean for society, the economy, and insurance? 🚗 
 
At the 13th Allianz Motor Day, experts from the automotive industry, science, and politics explored the opportunities and risks of this technology. Advanced driver-assistant features such as automatic emergency braking can prevent a significant share of crashes. However, concerns about system reliability and the desire to take control at any time persist. A European-wide survey from Allianz shows that 55% of respondents expect autonomous vehicles to be safer or at least as safe as human-driven vehicles. 
 
Do you trust autonomous vehicles? If not, what would help build your trust?  
 
Swipe through the photos for insights into the event. 
 
#AllianzMotorDay #Allianz

node.text:
Birthday candles are easy 🎂. The real test: do you have strong puffing power like a penguin🐧? 

#StepIntoLife #Allianz

This summer, we celebrated the unsung heroes of sports with our inaugural Unity Awards.
🏆✨ 

We honored individuals who transform sports into powerful tools for social change and community building. Our finalists came from local sports clubs worldwide, with this year’s winners based in Egypt, Spain, and the UK. 

To wrap things up, we photographed one of our finalists, the amazing team from FC Forstern in their Unity Awards jerseys. Their “Alle am Ball” (“Everyone on the Ball”) project brings together players of all abilities and ages. ⚽ 

Swipe to see team members wearing their Unity Awards jerseys. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #FCForstern #Allianz

We all know this feeling: You wake up at 3am and it feels like you're alone in your worries. But you're not. In fact, our "3AM Report" shows: Many people around the world share the same concerns.

Swipe through to discover what 8,000 individuals across eight countries shared with us about their deepest worries.

#Allianz

node.text:
Win Olympian Felix Loch’s balance board! 🏄
 
Balance is the secret to living longer – and through simple life checks like the Flamingo Test, you can see just how ready you are.
See how @loch_felix gets on – and then try to win his board!

For your chance to win:

1. Like this post
2. Comment with a flamingo emoji 🦩

5 boards, 5 winners. Hurry, entries close October 27 at 23:59 CET. T&Cs in bio.

#StepIntoLife #MilanoCortina2026 #Olympics #Allianz

node.text:
1️⃣ for seven years in a row! 🏆

Allianz has once again been recognized as the world’s leading insurance brand in the @interbrand Best Global Brands Ranking and is a top rising brand.

🥇 Insurer = #1

⬆️ Brand value = 28.2bn USD (+20%)

⬆️ Rank #27 (+2)

A heartfelt thank you to our customers around the world for the trust, and to our employees, agents, and brokers for their dedication and care.

#BGB2025 #Allianz

Age is just a number. Balance seconds tell the real story🦩.

#StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text: Balance like a flamingo 🦩! How many seconds can you last? #StepIntoLife #Allianz

Have you heard about the 4% rule?
Meet William Bengen, whose research proved that steady withdrawals could sustain retirement for decades.
So here’s the real question: if you withdrew 4% of your savings each year right now, how long would yours last?

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz

Ever wonder how your money grows while you sleep? In this edition of our Finance 101 series, we’re diving into one of the most powerful forces in finance: compound interest.

Whether you're saving or investing, understanding how it works can help you build long-term wealth, step by step.

➡️ Revisit the basics of finance with our Financial Literacy Hub. Tap the link in bio to explore.

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz

When it comes to investing, it’s not just about what you earn, it’s about what you keep. 💡 In this edition of our Finance 101 series, you learn why understanding your tax liability is key to making smarter, more efficient financial moves. 

➡️ Build a stronger financial future with the resources on the financial hub, link in bio.

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz

node.text:
Every year, an astounding 2.8 trillion dollars in global losses go uninsured. 🤯 That’s 3% of global GDP. We believe AI can help close that gap and we’re already utilising it to help support the insurance process. 

From 24/7 multilingual support to predicting extreme weather and accelerating claims, AI is making protection more accessible and affordable for our customers around the world. ⭐️

Learn more with the link in bio. 

#Allianz

AI is transforming insurance.
 
Our Group Chief Privacy & AI Trust Officer Philipp Raether makes sure that insurance gets better with AI, and keeps it safe and ethical. Responsible AI and transparency are the only way to build trust. 🌎
 
How is AI helping you innovate in your work?
 
#Allianz

At Allianz, we build on the transformative power of AI. 

For Barbara Karuth-Zelle, our Board Member and Group COO, technology is a powerful enabler that enhances our capabilities, drives innovation, and sharpens our focus on customer needs. 🤝

How do you see AI shaping resilience in your work?

#Allianz

AI is helping Allianz move from looking back at risks to preventing them before they happen.

For Lucie Bakker that shift shows how technology can empower us to better protect customers. 💡

How do you see AI driving prevention in your industry?

#Allianz

node.text:
AI is changing the world and insurance is no exception. 🌍​
​
From personalised experiences to faster claims, it’s about building a better insurance experience. With humans always in the loop. ​
​
💬 Comment below your ideas on how AI can improve your insurance experience.​ ​ #Allianz

node.text:
Underwriters make big decisions that affect your insurance protection. 🔒 But before that, they often read through multiple documents just to ensure they’re creating the right policy for you.​
​
🤖 With tools like BRIAN, a generative AI assistant built by @allianz_uk, we’re helping them work faster, reduce errors, focus on real risk, and make sure real people, like you, get the help they need.​
​
#Allianz

node.text:
Even when help was declined, our Patient Companion Team didn’t give up. They stayed by the family’s side and guided a young woman back to health.   Tap the link in bio to learn about her story. 

#HumansOfAllianz #Allianz

AI is transforming many aspects of our lives, from the way we shop and work to how we protect what matters. At Allianz, we believe in building an AI-enabled future that puts people first. 💪🏼​

But we are curious about how YOU feel!​

➡️ Swipe through our test, answer honestly, and tell us your score in the comments!​

#Allianz

node.text:
🏆 Meet Unity Awards winner Rosa Sanchez, a coach at the CD Sportcab Marbella. 
 
Rosa uses football as a tool to empower young athletes. At Sportcab Marbella, they have the oportunity to build confidence and find a sense of belonging. 
 
“Our club is a big family with different nationalities. With this prize, we will be able to improve the infrastructure and pay scholarships for some of our athletes to continue playing”, says Rosa. 
 
Learn more about rosa and her work at CD Sportcab Marbella in the video. 
 
🌍 Discover more about the Unity Awards via the link in our bio. 
 
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
🏆 Meet Unity Awards winner project F6IT, from the UK.  
  
F6IT is an initiative that uses adaptive sports programs to unite children with disabilities and their families. F6IT fosters unity among friends and families, creating a supportive and inclusive community.   
  
“This prize will help us reach more families and to offer more activities to them”, says founder Anel van der Merwe.    
  
Learn more about the F6IT initiative and its inspiring work in the video.   
  
🌍 Discover more about the Unity Awards via the link in our bio. 
  
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

Success in investing isn’t about chasing trends, it’s about building strong habits.
Here are three more key principles to guide you:​

💡 Diversify smartly: Spread your investments, but don’t overdo it.​
💡 Keep costs low: High fees = lower returns over time.​
💡 Stay the course: Don’t let market swings shake your strategy.​
 
📈 Investing is a long game. Save and share with someone starting their investment journey!​

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz

node.text:
🏆 Meet Unity Awards winner Sara Moamen Abdelsamie, founder of the „Dreamers“ initiative. Based in Cairo, Sara’s project fosters inclusion and offers mental health support to immigrant youth.   
  
“This prize will help us bring more people into the project and include them in the community,” says Sara.   
  
Learn more about Sara and her inspiring Dreamers project in the video.   
  
🌍 Discover more about the Unity Awards via the link in our bio. 
  
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

💥 Meet the Unity Awards winners! 🏆 
 
We are happy to announce the winners of the Unity Awards. These inspiring individuals and initiatives use sports to unite, break down barriers, and bring communities together. 
 
And the winners are: 
 
✅ Sara Moamen Abdelsamie - Dreamers (Cairo) 
Empowering refugees and marginalized youth through sports training, particularly in flying disc, and providing mental health support. 🥏 
 
✅ Coach Rosa Sánchez - CD Sportcab Marbella (Spain) 
Using football to help immigrant youth learn the language, build friendships, and foster inclusion. ⚽️ 
 
✅ The F6it project and Anel van der Merwe - UK 
Creating inclusive, adaptive sports programs for children with disabilities and their families. 🧑🏻‍🦽‍➡️ 
 
Huge congratulations to all the winners! 🎉 And thank you to everyone who took part! Together, we show the world that sports have the power to unite. 

👉 Learn more about the Unity Awards and the winners via the link in our bio. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

💡Smart investing isn’t about quick wins, it’s about long-term success.

Starting early, investing consistently, and staying focused on the bigger picture can make all the difference.

Managing risk keeps your portfolio balanced through market ups and downs. Save this for later & share with someone on their investing journey! 📌✨​

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz​

node.text:
Getting your first credit card 💳 can be an important milestone towards financial independence – but one that comes with more responsibility than most people might realize at first. 

To help you avoid the most common slip-ups that can cost you later, we created this quick checklist. 

Share and save this post, and step into credit with clarity!  

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz

node.text:
A dream trip to Thailand turned into a medical emergency for Allan Cockburn and his wife.
 
In our latest episode of “Humans at Allianz”, Allan tells their story and how the team from @allianzpartners „took all the worry away“.
 
Watch the full story via the link in our bio. 
 
#HumansOfAllianz #Allianz

📣 All together – Allianz opens the doors of the Allianz Arena for the FC Bayern Frauen opening match on September 6th.
🎟️ Get free tickets now for your team, your friends, or your family and be there live when the FC Bayern Frauen kick off their season! 🏟️
⚡ Tell us what’s your superpower and win up to 20 tickets for the match
👉 Take part now with the link in our Bio.

#AllTogether #FCBayern #Allianz #Unity

node.text:
As helpful as our emotions are, in the world of investing, they can sometimes work against us. 🤯
Behavioral biases often affect how we invest, and not always in a good way. However, being able to recognize them is half the battle when making smart financial decisions.

📈 Have you noticed any of these investing biases yourself? Let us know in the comments, and don’t forget to check out the Allianz Financial Workout link in bio to start investing smarter.

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz

node.text:
🏆 The Unity Awards continue to celebrate initiatives that use sport to unite communities! 

Today, we highlight our last finalist: The F6IT Foundation in the UK 🇬🇧. 

Through adaptive sports programs, F6IT brings children with disabilities and their families together. The initiative exemplifies how sport can break down barriers and foster unity among friends and families.

💬 Over the past weeks, we’ve introduced the eleven Unity Awards finalists, sharing incredible stories that truly demonstrate the power of sport in fostering unity. We thank all participants for their amazing stories!   

🗓️ The winners will be announced in August. Stay tuned! 

Discover more via the link in our bio.

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
Join Olympic athlete Daryll Neita and Allianz as we visit Dragons Wheelchair Rugby, a finalist of the Unity Awards. 🏆
As we meet the passionate team behind Dragons Wheelchair Rugby, we see firsthand how they unite communities through the power of sport.  
Learn more about the Unity Awards at allianz.com (http://allianz.com/). 
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
Heute schauen wir auf die großartige Arbeit von Türkiyemspor Berlin 1978 – einem Finalisten der Allianz Unity Awards! 🏆❤️
Die Allianz und ich waren bei ihnen zu Besuch und haben gesehen, wie sie durch Sport Menschen zusammenbringen und echte Inklusion fördern.
Mehr über die Unity Awards und inspirierende Projekte findest du auf allianz.com

-

Today, we shine a spotlight on the incredible work of Türkiyemspor Berlin 1978, a finalist in the Allianz Unity Awards! 🏆❤️
Join Allianz and me as we visit the club to showcase their inspiring efforts in using sport to unite communities. See firsthand how they foster inclusion through the power of sport. 
Don’t miss out on discovering more about the Unity Awards and the amazing initiatives at allianz.com
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

Stay tuned as Allianz and I prepare to visit the Dragons Wheelchair Rugby club, from Wales, a finalist of the Unity Awards! 🏆
We will showcase their inspiring story, highlighting how they use sport to empower and unite communities. You won’t want to miss the video!
Find out more about the Unity Awards at allianz.com.

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
🏆 The Unity Awards continue to celebrate initiatives that use sport to unite communities!
Today, we highlight the next two finalists:

🇵🇹 @lenine.cunha, Paralympic athlete and leader of Clube de Futebol Oliveira do Douro in Portugal. The club offers coaching, mentorship, and competition opportunities for athletes with and without disabilities.

🇪🇸 Coach Rosa Sánchez in Spain uses football to help immigrant youth learn the language, build confidence, and find a sense of belonging. CD Sportcab Marbella provides a safe space for young athletes to build friendships and promote inclusion.

🌍 Both finalists show how sport can break down barriers and bring people together.

🔗 Discover more via the link in our bio. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
🏆 The Unity Awards are all about celebrating the unsung heroes who use sport to unite communities! 

Today, we are putting a spotlight on two very inspiring finalists: 

✅ Slow Swimming over 60 (Trieste, Italy) offers a sustainable and healthy lifestyle for people over 60. The project fosters strong social bonds and creates a positive environment for all participants. 
 
✅ @bbu01 is a basketball team for people with intellectual disabilities. Founded in 2017, this team exemplifies the power of sport to foster belonging and teamwork. 

These projects are perfect examples of how sport can bring people together. Discover more about these inspiring projects and the Unity Awards at the link in the bio. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
Our brains love patterns, even when they work against us. 🧠

Behavioral biases can shape how we invest without us realizing it.

The good news? Once you spot them, you can make smarter financial decisions. 👀

Let us know in the comments which investing biases you’ve noticed in yourself and follow us for Part 2!

📈 Start investing smarter with our Allianz Financial Workout - link in bio.

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz

node.text:
🏆 The Unity Awards are reaching their final stage and it’s time to celebrate the incredible finalists who embody the spirit of unity through sport! 

Today, we shine a spotlight on two amazing finalists: 

✅ Coach Hans Stanggassinger, from Germany, was nominated by Olympic champion Felix Loch @loch_felix . He has dedicated decades to training athletes and leaving a lasting impact on the luge community. A true unsung hero in the world of sports. 

✅ Sara Moamen Abdelsamie @saramoamen94 , founder of the Dreamers Initiative in Cairo, Egypt, is another inspiring finalist. Her project empowers refugees and marginalized youth through sports training, particularly in flying disc, while also offering vital mental health support. 

Discover more about these inspiring Unity Awards finalists at allianz.com.  

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

You helped us celebrate the unsung heroes of sport.
 
From all the incredible nominations, 12 projects were selected as finalists. Each showing how sport can unite communities and spark real change.
 
Today, we’re proud to introduce the first two:
⚽ FC Forstern (Germany 🇩🇪)
🎾 Bright Ideas for Tennis (UK 🇬🇧)
 
Both of them are promoting inclusion through sports every day for everyone.💙
 
Swipe through to discover their stories.
👉More via the link in our bio.
 
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
Not all debt is the same: Understanding how each type of debt might influence your life can help you make smarter financial decisions. From student loans to credit cards, here’s a quick playful breakdown of how common types of debt show up in your life. 💸 

Did you spot a familiar one? Tag a friend who should meet their financial match. 

#FinancialLiteracy #Allianz

node.text:
Over the past weeks, we invited you to share stories of your unsung heroes. We received amazing accounts from parents, coaches, clubs, and teammates.
 
Thank you for helping us celebrate the everyday champions.
 
And thank you for everyone who is making a difference through sports.
 
The Power of Unity Awards winner will be announced in August.
 
More details can be found via the link in our bio. 
 
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

Only 3 days left to apply for the Allianz Unity Awards!
 
Are you part of a local sports club, a dedicated coach, a teammate, or a parent using sport to bring people together and tackle community challenges?
 
This is your chance to be a Unity Awards winner & receive financial support to grow your impact through sport!
 
Apply now! Link in our bio.
 
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
When @atefehahmadi.official left her home country, Iran, in 2023 and applied for asylum in Germany, everything felt unfamiliar. But through sport, she found her strength again. Today, she’s a world famous skier and the first and only Refugee Athlete Scholarship-holder in a winter sport. 

„My teammates and the slopes became my second home“ she says.
This is the power of sport. This is the power of unity.

💬 Do you know someone with a story like this?
🕐 Applications for the Unity Awards are open until June 30.

👉Learn more via the link in our bio. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

At Allianz, we are dedicated to fostering an inclusive workplace with equal opportunities for all. Our commitment is evident in initiatives like the Power of Unity program, launched last year to promote constructive engagement amid global polarization. Our efforts have also earned us the 17th spot among the Top 25 World's Best Workplaces, highlighting our investment in a work environment where employees are valued, respected, and empowered.
 
As we celebrate Pride Month, we reaffirm these values. We strive to bridge divides and foster unity, promoting a corporate culture that cherishes talent and cultivates an environment free from discrimination. This is the true power of unity.
 
This June, we celebrate Pride saying #LetYourColorsFly and be the best version of yourself. Happy Pride!
 
To learn more about the Power of Unity Program, visit Allianz.com.
 
#PowerOfUnity #Allianz

node.text:
It’s Olympics Day! What’s your “unity through sport” story?

‘’Sport unifies people from across the globe and abilities, all in the spirit of teamwork and fair play.’’ @thomasroehler, Olympic champion and Allianz ambassador.

Think your story could inspire others? Share it in a video format to be one of the Allianz Unity Award winners! Tell us how sport helped you build connection, inclusion, or community.

Application is open until June 30. Link in our bio. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
Who made you believe sport is more than just a game? Nominate them for the Allianz Unity Awards by June 30, 2025.

Maybe it is your family member, your biggest supporter, who drove you to every practice, stood on the sidelines in rain or shine, and reminded you that sport is about bringing people together and creating lasting connections.

Let the world know about the one who made it possible. Read more about the process via the link in our bio. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

Tap the link in our bio to learn more!

node.text:
@daryllneita, British sprinter and Olympic medalist, has been working to get young people involved in sports and to inspire the next generation. She is now a Unity Awards Ambassador and knows very well the impact that local sports can have on communities.  
 
„For me is all about the connection and having people in your corner who support you and bring out the best in you. That could be from your teammates, your coaches, your friends, your families. Just people that show up for you behind the scenes.”, says Neita. 
 
Do you also have this kind of support from your local team?   
 
Share your story in the comments for a chance to be selected as one of the Allianz Unity Award winners!  
 
Applications are open until June 30. More details can be found via the link in our bio. 
 
#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
„I’ve played in teams with people with different ages, with people from different places, from different cultural backgrounds, with all differences, but no matter in which team I played, we were always one team. One ‚unity‘!”, says @prinzessinjeanniefee, Allianz Unity Awards Ambassador.
 
Do you also have teammates or play in a team like this? Share your story with us.
 
Application is open until June 30. More details can be found via the link in our bio. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

node.text:
There is one coach who changed everything. 🙏🏼

Nominate a coach who inspires, unites, and uplifts, someone who always believed in you before the medals, before the wins, even before you believed in yourself. 

Help us shine a light on the unity unsung heroes behind the scenes and nominate them today for #AllianzUnityAwards! 🏆

🗓️ Deadline: June 30, 2025. Link in our bio. 

#PowerOfUnity #AllianzUnityAwards #Allianz

In the latest Mission Impossible movie, Ethan Hunt and his team are once again trying to save the world. But at what cost? Literally!
 
Our Allianz experts have analyzed the action-packed scenes in “Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning” and added a price tag to all the destruction.
 
Let us know your guess in the comments!🔍💸
 
#Allianz
